name: Promise Transportation

name: Goldstar Transport
registry_source: Oregon Secretary of State Business Registry (not directly pulled)
notes: Company is Gold Star Transport, Inc. — a NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORT (NEMT) operator, NOT a school bus operator. Founded 2006 by Donald and Donna Smith in Salem, OR; services hospice/palliative care and OHP/Medicaid brokerage clients in Marion, Polk, Yamhill, Linn, and Benton counties; fleet ~9 vehicles. Direct USDOT/MC for this Salem entity NOT confirmed via SAFER keyword search (returned Stockton CA / Dickinson ND only). USDOT 282299 is OREGON PETROLEUM TRANSPORT (different company). May operate solely intrastate without USDOT or be filed under a related LLC name. Likely not a Summit tuck-in fit (medical, not student transport).

name: Suburban School Transportation
entity_status: active (per OH Sec of State business records inferred from BBB and ODE OEDS listing 009334)
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State business search / Ohio Dept of Education OEDS (Organization ID 009334)
notes: Input address (17 Yetten Ter, Waltham MA 02453) is INCONSISTENT with the company's actual operations — Suburban School Transportation (SSTN) is headquartered at 1289 Pearl Road, Brunswick OH 44212, serving 75+ NE Ohio school districts with 225+ vehicles. The Waltham MA address appears to be a data error in the input; state field 'OH' is correct. SAFER keyword search for 'SUBURBAN SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' returns no records; SAFER 'SUBURBAN TRANSPORTATION CO INC' USDOT 2592421 at 1289 Pearl Rd Brunswick OH has only 4 power units (intrastate, no rating) and is likely an affiliated/legacy entity, not the operating SSTN carrier. The main SSTN entity may operate without a separate USDOT (intrastate Ohio carriers under ODE jurisdiction do not require USDOT). Power_units=225 from company website.

name: Monark Student Trnsprtn Corp
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State Business Filing (per company materials / BBB / Manta)
notes: Strong match. FMCSA SAFER confirms MONARK STUDENT TRANSPORTATION CORPORATION at Gibsonia PA HQ with USDOT 856887 and MC-383565; 260 power units / 200 drivers; Satisfactory safety rating (rating date 10/02/2000; latest review 04/01/2021); MCS-150 dated 04/24/2026; 4 crashes in past 24 months. Input listed Grove City PA / 20 Eastgate Industrial Dr as one of Monark's terminal/satellite locations; company has 5 locations including Gibsonia (HQ), Ambridge, McDonald, Pittsburgh, and Union City PA. Established 1997 by Mark D. Schmitt. Serves West Allegheny, Quaker Valley, Grove City, Hampton, North Catholic, and Pittsburgh school districts.
